heading: Executive Director; additional personnel; detail of personnel of other agencies
label: 353 Executive Director; additional personnel; detail of personnel of other agencies

References in Other Laws to GS–16, 17, or 18 Pay RatesReferences in laws to the rates of pay for GS–16, 17, or 18, or to maximum rates of pay under the General Schedule, to be considered references to rates payable under specified sections of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, see section 529 [title I, § 101(c)(1)] of , set out in a note under .Pub. L. 101–509section 5376 of Title 5
amendments: Amendments1989— substituted “subparagraphs (A) and (B) of ” for “section 352(2) and (3) of this title” in pars. (1) and (2).Pub. L. 101–194section 352(8) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Commission is authorized to appoint an Executive Director and fix his basic pay at the rate provided for level V of the Executive Schedule by ; andsection 5316 of title 5

children.label: B
children.text: with the approval of the Commission, the Executive Director is authorized to appoint and fix the basic pay (at respective rates not in excess of the maximum rate of the General Schedule in ) of such additional personnel as may be necessary to carry out the function of the Commission.section 5332 of title 5

Upon the request of the Commission, the head of any department, agency, or establishment of any branch of the Federal Government is authorized to detail, on a reimbursable basis, for periods covering all or part of any fiscal year referred to in subparagraphs (A) and (B) of , any of the personnel of such department, agency, or establishment to assist the Commission in carrying out its function.section 352(8) of this title
